### Recent Releases

<!-- RECENT_RELEASES -->
<ul>
<li>
  <strong>2026-04-20</strong> – <a href="https://github.com/insin/comments-owl-for-hacker-news">comments-owl-for-hacker-news</a> <a href="https://github.com/insin/comments-owl-for-hacker-news/releases/tag/v3.6.1">v3.6.1</a>
  <div><em>Browser extension which makes it easer to follow comment threads on Hacker News across multiple visits, allows you to annotate and mute users, and other UI tweaks and mobile UX improvements</em></div>
  <details><summary>v3.6.1 release notes</summary><p>Visit the <a href="https://soitis.dev/comments-owl-for-hacker-news" rel="nofollow">Comments Owl for Hacker News website</a> for installation links, more information about the extension, and FAQs (mostly about Safari).</p>
<p>Follow <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/soitis.dev" rel="nofollow">@soitis.dev</a> on Bluesky or <a href="https://twitter.com/ControlPanelFT" rel="nofollow">@ControlPanelFT</a> on Twitter for updates.</p>
<h2>Changes</h2>
<p>This release makes HN themeable, and adds a dark mode, with a pure black variant for OLED screens.</p>
<p>Colors in the default HN stylesheet have been reapplied using CSS variables, and new rules have been added to allow colors hardcoded in HTML (and the HN SVG logo) to be changed.</p>
<p>You can view the CSS variables via in the extension's <a href="https://github.com/insin/comments-owl-for-hacker-news/blob/master/style.css">stylesheet</a>.</p>
<ul>
<li>Made HN themeable by default - when in default/light mode there will be an <code>html[light]</code> attribute for light mode-specific theming</li>
<li>Added a dark mode, with a pure black variant for OLED screens - these add <code>html[dark]</code> and <code>html[pure-black]</code> attributes as hooks for mode-specific theming</li>
<li>Added an option to enable CSS view transitions between page (not supported in Firefox) and pretend HN is now a Single Page Application
<ul>
<li>Added a list → item transition which many of you will immediately want to disable (which is why there's an option to do so)</li>
</ul>
</li>
<li>Custom CSS is now injected earlier, reducing Flash Of Whatever You're Doing With Custom CSS (especially if you're doing something like making comment threads narrower for readability)</li>
<li>Fixed caching failed user hovercard profile requests forever</li>
</ul>
<h2>Availability (2/5)</h2>
<p>New versions have to be reviewed and published by each browser extension store before they're available for use.</p>
<p>This version is available for the following browsers:</p>
<p><a href="https://addons.mozilla.org/firefox/addon/hn-comments-owl/" title="Firefox and Firefox for Android" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/307636781-566d72e8-bd40-43a4-9118-1768946f5b20.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvMzA3NjM2NzgxLTU2NmQ3MmU4LWJkNDAtNDNhNC05MTE4LTE3Njg5NDZmNWIyMC5wbmc_.S7U4_6dp8Qu92aIlKqzUXpkz8P-TXt8sO6UTF8WjOeg" alt="Firefox and Firefox for Android" content-type-secured-asset="image/png" secured-asset-link="" style="max-width: 100%;"></a> <a href="https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/comments-owl-for-hacker-n/kpoggabejgbenjahggloahnnaolmfock" title="Chrome and Chromium-based browsers" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/307584913-08b44d7b-61d5-49f2-9a76-607eb36fe407.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvMzA3NTg0OTEzLTA4YjQ0ZDdiLTYxZDUtNDlmMi05YTc2LTYwN2ViMzZmZTQwNy5wbmc_.z_75kQd4uxZuFgvzuW_rCqN4g7_3pD788Mv4o41-iwc" alt="Chrome and Chromium-based browsers" content-type-secured-asset="image/png" secured-asset-link="" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></p>

<h3>Theming dark mode - Twitter Dim theme (still available on Twitter via <a href="https://soitis.dev/control-panel-for-twitter" rel="nofollow">Control Panel for Twitter</a>!)</h3>
<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/580563659-94f8a7bf-d255-4cae-8944-781e64467dce.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNTgwNTYzNjU5LTk0ZjhhN2JmLWQyNTUtNGNhZS04OTQ0LTc4MWU2NDQ2N2RjZS5wbmc_.b9nJ_ljb-Jx4j3lKarEUctEewCJZIEK89qL0BFC6IeI"><img width="2000" height="1451" alt="Screenshot 2026-04-20 at 1 21 57 pm" src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/580563659-94f8a7bf-d255-4cae-8944-781e64467dce.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNTgwNTYzNjU5LTk0ZjhhN2JmLWQyNTUtNGNhZS04OTQ0LTc4MWU2NDQ2N2RjZS5wbmc_.b9nJ_ljb-Jx4j3lKarEUctEewCJZIEK89qL0BFC6IeI" content-type-secured-asset="image/png" style="max-width: 100%; height: auto; max-height: 1451px;"></a>
<details><summary>View and copy CSS</summary>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-css notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="/* Twitter Dim theme for dark mode */
html[dark]:not([pure-black]) {
  --bg-page: rgb(21, 32, 43);
  --bg-content: rgb(21, 32, 43);
  --bg-highlight: rgb(44, 53, 64);
  --bg-input: rgb(27, 36, 47);
  --text-primary: rgb(247, 249, 249);
  --text-secondary: rgb(139, 152, 165);
  #hnmain {
    border: 1px solid rgb(56, 68, 77);
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-c">/* Twitter Dim theme for dark mode */</span>
<span class="pl-ent">html</span>[<span class="pl-c1">dark</span>]<span class="pl-kos">:</span><span class="pl-c1">not</span>([<span class="pl-c1">pure-black</span>]) {
  <span class="pl-s1">--bg-page</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-en">rgb</span>(<span class="pl-c1">21</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">32</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">43</span>);
  <span class="pl-s1">--bg-content</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-en">rgb</span>(<span class="pl-c1">21</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">32</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">43</span>);
  <span class="pl-s1">--bg-highlight</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-en">rgb</span>(<span class="pl-c1">44</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">53</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">64</span>);
  <span class="pl-s1">--bg-input</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-en">rgb</span>(<span class="pl-c1">27</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">36</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">47</span>);
  <span class="pl-s1">--text-primary</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-en">rgb</span>(<span class="pl-c1">247</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">249</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">249</span>);
  <span class="pl-s1">--text-secondary</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-en">rgb</span>(<span class="pl-c1">139</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">152</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">165</span>);
  <span class="pl-kos">#</span><span class="pl-c1">hnmain</span> {
    <span class="pl-c1">border</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-c1">1<span class="pl-smi">px</span></span> solid <span class="pl-en">rgb</span>(<span class="pl-c1">56</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">68</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-c1">77</span>);
  }
}</pre></div>
</details>
<h3>Tweaking pure black mode</h3>
<p>Rounding those corners which are now floating in the void:</p>
<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/580563801-c9eb9184-a542-4193-a645-95eb76c584e0.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNTgwNTYzODAxLWM5ZWI5MTg0LWE1NDItNDE5My1hNjQ1LTk1ZWI3NmM1ODRlMC5wbmc_.RYL0gmjfX43xZD2JWDIUSPHMdigaXKmetd5hh_c50Rk"><img width="2000" height="1451" alt="Screenshot 2026-04-20 at 1 51 10 pm" src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/580563801-c9eb9184-a542-4193-a645-95eb76c584e0.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNTgwNTYzODAxLWM5ZWI5MTg0LWE1NDItNDE5My1hNjQ1LTk1ZWI3NmM1ODRlMC5wbmc_.RYL0gmjfX43xZD2JWDIUSPHMdigaXKmetd5hh_c50Rk" content-type-secured-asset="image/png" style="max-width: 100%; height: auto; max-height: 1451px;"></a>
<details><summary>View and copy CSS</summary>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-css notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="/* Round floating corners in pure black mode */
html[pure-black] {
  #hnlogo, input { border-radius: 6px; }
  #header, .new &gt; td, textarea {
    border-radius: 8px;
  }
  .new:has(+ .new) &gt; td  {
    border-bottom-left-radius: 0;
    border-bottom-right-radius: 0;
  }
  .new + .new &gt; td {
    border-top-left-radius: 0;
    border-top-right-radius: 0;
  }
}"><pre><span class="pl-c">/* Round floating corners in pure black mode */</span>
<span class="pl-ent">html</span>[<span class="pl-c1">pure-black</span>] {
  <span class="pl-kos">#</span><span class="pl-c1">hnlogo</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-ent">input</span> { <span class="pl-c1">border-radius</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-c1">6<span class="pl-smi">px</span></span>; }
  <span class="pl-kos">#</span><span class="pl-c1">header</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> .<span class="pl-c1">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span> <span class="pl-ent">td</span><span class="pl-kos">,</span> <span class="pl-ent">textarea</span> {
    <span class="pl-c1">border-radius</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-c1">8<span class="pl-smi">px</span></span>;
  }
  .<span class="pl-c1">new</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span><span class="pl-c1">has</span>(<span class="pl-c1">+</span> .<span class="pl-c1">new</span>) <span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span> <span class="pl-ent">td</span>  {
    <span class="pl-c1">border-bottom-left-radius</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
    <span class="pl-c1">border-bottom-right-radius</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  }
  .<span class="pl-c1">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">+</span> .<span class="pl-c1">new</span> <span class="pl-c1">&gt;</span> <span class="pl-ent">td</span> {
    <span class="pl-c1">border-top-left-radius</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
    <span class="pl-c1">border-top-right-radius</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-c1">0</span>;
  }
}</pre></div>
</details>
<h3>Theming light mode - Solarized</h3>
<p>We're not light mode coding theme people (not that there's anything wrong with that!), so we don't know if this is any good, but chuck our CSS variables at the nearest LLM and it will do this for you:</p>
<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/580563921-6574cf10-4df9-4051-88bc-1ad3641ccb0d.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNTgwNTYzOTIxLTY1NzRjZjEwLTRkZjktNDA1MS04OGJjLTFhZDM2NDFjY2IwZC5wbmc_.DHqyCdpOUB_JV8aq2cyGhJRlc0LQfctegsPb5ZIXIug"><img width="2000" height="1451" alt="Screenshot 2026-04-20 at 1 31 28 pm" src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/580563921-6574cf10-4df9-4051-88bc-1ad3641ccb0d.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNTgwNTYzOTIxLTY1NzRjZjEwLTRkZjktNDA1MS04OGJjLTFhZDM2NDFjY2IwZC5wbmc_.DHqyCdpOUB_JV8aq2cyGhJRlc0LQfctegsPb5ZIXIug" content-type-secured-asset="image/png" style="max-width: 100%; height: auto; max-height: 1451px;"></a>
<details><summary>View and copy CSS</summary>
<div class="highlight highlight-source-css notranslate position-relative overflow-auto" data-snippet-clipboard-copy-content="/* Solarized */
html[light] {
  --bg-page: #fdf6e3;
  --bg-content: #fdf6e3;
  --bg-highlight: #eee8d5;
  --text-primary: #657b83;
  --text-secondary: #93a1a1;
  --link: #268bd2;
  #hnmain { border: 1px solid #e1dac8; }
}"><pre><span class="pl-c">/* Solarized */</span>
<span class="pl-ent">html</span>[<span class="pl-c1">light</span>] {
  <span class="pl-s1">--bg-page</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-pds"><span class="pl-kos">#</span>fdf6e3</span>;
  <span class="pl-s1">--bg-content</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-pds"><span class="pl-kos">#</span>fdf6e3</span>;
  <span class="pl-s1">--bg-highlight</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-pds"><span class="pl-kos">#</span>eee8d5</span>;
  <span class="pl-s1">--text-primary</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-pds"><span class="pl-kos">#</span>657b83</span>;
  <span class="pl-s1">--text-secondary</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-pds"><span class="pl-kos">#</span>93a1a1</span>;
  <span class="pl-s1">--link</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-pds"><span class="pl-kos">#</span>268bd2</span>;
  <span class="pl-kos">#</span><span class="pl-c1">hnmain</span> { <span class="pl-c1">border</span><span class="pl-kos">:</span> <span class="pl-c1">1<span class="pl-smi">px</span></span> solid <span class="pl-pds"><span class="pl-kos">#</span>e1dac8</span>; }
}</pre></div>
</details>
<h3>View transitions</h3>
<p>This is more of a "your scientists didn't stop to think if they should" feature - if you inject CSS immediately at <code>document_start</code>, you can make <a href="https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Reference/At-rules/@view-transition" rel="nofollow">cross-document <code>@view-transition</code></a> work on any static site, although you're limited to what you can achieve with its existing markup.</p>
<p>We used this to enable the default cross-fade transition (sped up slightly), and to animate item info when navigating from list → item pages (which can be disabled independently).</p>
<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/580564168-3991e9e8-3c73-4654-8fc9-0d50c974b92d.gif?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNTgwNTY0MTY4LTM5OTFlOWU4LTNjNzMtNDY1NC04ZmM5LTBkNTBjOTc0YjkyZC5naWY_.CjkynsGpy7h507IwkiIW4XAx2BLw-cHa0tFVb9QHC1E"><img width="1015" height="574" alt="view-transitions" src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/580564168-3991e9e8-3c73-4654-8fc9-0d50c974b92d.gif?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNTgwNTY0MTY4LTM5OTFlOWU4LTNjNzMtNDY1NC04ZmM5LTBkNTBjOTc0YjkyZC5naWY_.CjkynsGpy7h507IwkiIW4XAx2BLw-cHa0tFVb9QHC1E" content-type-secured-asset="image/gif" style="max-width: 100%; height: auto; max-height: 574px;"></a>
<h2>Donate</h2>
<p>Support Comments Owl for Hacker News development with a tip:</p>
<p><a href="https://ko-fi.com/jbscript" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/330361609-c318a7d3-695e-448d-af15-ef0b934ae168.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvMzMwMzYxNjA5LWMzMThhN2QzLTY5NWUtNDQ4ZC1hZjE1LWVmMGI5MzRhZTE2OC5wbmc_.WzHoSzCWSLUaiUPZpr569eYDf6BWA_uDMyOsutRGFXI" alt="Support us on Ko-fi" content-type-secured-asset="image/png" secured-asset-link="" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></p></details>
</li>
<li>
  <strong>2026-04-15</strong> – <a href="https://github.com/insin/control-panel-for-youtube">control-panel-for-youtube</a> <a href="https://github.com/insin/control-panel-for-youtube/releases/tag/v1.33.1">v1.33.1</a>
  <div><em>Browser extension which gives you more control over YouTube by adding missing options and UI improvements - for desktop &amp; mobile browsers</em></div>
  <details><summary>v1.33.1 release notes</summary><p>Visit the <a href="https://soitis.dev/control-panel-for-youtube" rel="nofollow">Control Panel for YouTube website</a> for installation links, more information about the extension, and FAQs (mostly about Safari).</p>
<p>Follow <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/soitis.dev" rel="nofollow">@soitis.dev</a> on Bluesky or <a href="https://twitter.com/ControlPanelFT" rel="nofollow">@ControlPanelFT</a> on Twitter for updates.</p>
<h2>Changes</h2>
<ul>
<li>Added an option to hide the watch page sidebar on desktop when it's empty</li>
<li>Added an option to disable Stable Volume</li>
<li>Added missing German translations, fixing multiple features in German</li>
<li>Fixed hiding streamed videos on mobile</li>
<li>Fixed adding the "Hide channel" menu item on mobile</li>
<li>Fixed hiding channel banners on mobile</li>
<li>Fixed hiding the Share button in Shorts on mobile</li>
<li>Fixed hiding "Open app" in the Shorts menu on mobile</li>
<li>Fixed "Open app" not being hidden the first time a menu containing it is opened on mobile</li>
</ul>
<h2>Availability (3/5)</h2>
<p>New versions have to be reviewed and approved for each browser before they're available to install or upgrade to.</p>
<p>This version is available for the following browsers:</p>
<p><a href="https://apps.apple.com/app/id6478456678?platform=mac" title="Safari on macOS" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/407980194-5521baec-f246-4a91-9615-ef602e3743b5.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNDA3OTgwMTk0LTU1MjFiYWVjLWYyNDYtNGE5MS05NjE1LWVmNjAyZTM3NDNiNS5wbmc_._KKDgQ9M6wyNrDWF4huyooIOPgSuUdJk-MLdy-miUPw" <h2>Screenshots</h2>
<h3>New Hide sidebar when empty option</h3>
<p>This option hides the sidebar in the watch page when it's empty - if you're using Default view and hiding Related videos, this allows the player to take up more space, and centers the layout. The sidebar will reappear if something gets displayed in it, e.g. if you open the video transcript.</p>
<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/578776837-ad7e8214-6fb9-4483-a71d-2c6969702cfe.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNTc4Nzc2ODM3LWFkN2U4MjE0LTZmYjktNDQ4My1hNzFkLTJjNjk2OTcwMmNmZS5wbmc_.DLNojBfUPA-2aLxDhJtQnsRAVgrjupiqVl4PIBSxMSQ"><img width="750" height="240" src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/578776837-ad7e8214-6fb9-4483-a71d-2c6969702cfe.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNTc4Nzc2ODM3LWFkN2U4MjE0LTZmYjktNDQ4My1hNzFkLTJjNjk2OTcwMmNmZS5wbmc_.DLNojBfUPA-2aLxDhJtQnsRAVgrjupiqVl4PIBSxMSQ" content-type-secured-asset="image/png" style="max-width: 100%; height: auto; max-height: 240px;"></a>

</table>
<h3>New Disable Stable Volume option</h3>
<p>This option ensures the preference for Stable Volume off is set, automatically reapplying it if it somehow gets turned back on, removed or expired.</p>
<a target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" href="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/578781548-d57ea6e8-5de5-40cb-ac7b-b8cbb966d339.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNTc4NzgxNTQ4LWQ1N2VhNmU4LTVkZTUtNDBjYi1hYzdiLWI4Y2JiOTY2ZDMzOS5wbmc_.hK1komPwqGje03V24RHn7fAUw8OrmPcn4tGFicbaCro"><img width="788" height="394" alt="Screenshot 2026-04-16 at 4 02 46 am" src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/578781548-d57ea6e8-5de5-40cb-ac7b-b8cbb966d339.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvNTc4NzgxNTQ4LWQ1N2VhNmU4LTVkZTUtNDBjYi1hYzdiLWI4Y2JiOTY2ZDMzOS5wbmc_.hK1komPwqGje03V24RHn7fAUw8OrmPcn4tGFicbaCro" content-type-secured-asset="image/png" style="max-width: 100%; height: auto; max-height: 394px;"></a>

<p><a href="https://ko-fi.com/jbscript" rel="nofollow"><img src="https://private-user-images.githubusercontent.com/226692/330361609-c318a7d3-695e-448d-af15-ef0b934ae168.png?jwt=eyJ0eXAiOiJKV1QiLCJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiJ9.eyJpc3MiOiJnaXRodWIuY29tIiwiYXVkIjoicmF3LmdpdGh1YnVzZXJjb250ZW50LmNvbSIsImtleSI6ImtleTUiLCJleHAiOjE3NzY3MDYzNDksIm5iZiI6MTc3NjcwNjA0OSwicGF0aCI6Ii8yMjY2OTIvMzMwMzYxNjA5LWMzMThhN2QzLTY5NWUtNDQ4ZC1hZjE1LWVmMGI5MzRhZTE2OC5wbmc_.WzHoSzCWSLUaiUPZpr569eYDf6BWA_uDMyOsutRGFXI" alt="Support me on Ko-fi" content-type-secured-asset="image/png" secured-asset-link="" style="max-width: 100%;"></a></p></details>
</li>
<li>
  <strong>2026-04-06</strong> – <a href="https://github.com/insin/ai-overview-hider-for-google">ai-overview-hider-for-google</a> <a href="https://github.com/insin/ai-overview-hider-for-google/releases/tag/v1.0.11">v1.0.11</a>
  <div><em>Browser extension which hides the AI Overview section in Google search results on desktop and mobile browsers</em></div>
  <details><summary>v1.0.11 release notes</summary><p>Visit the <a href="https://soitis.dev/ai-overview-hider-for-google" rel="nofollow">AI Overview Hider for Google website</a> for installation links, more information about the extension, and FAQs.</p>
<p>Follow <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/soitis.dev" rel="nofollow">@soitis.dev</a> on Bluesky for updates.</p>
<h2>Changes</h2>
<ul>
<li>Fixed hiding "People also ask" items containing AI Overviews on desktop</li>
<li>Fixed fallbacks for hiding AI Overviews on desktop after Google removed the "Learn more" link</li>
</ul>
<h2>Availability (3/5)</h2>
<p>New versions have to be reviewed and approved by each browser before they're available to install or upgrade to.</p>
<p>This version is available for the following browsers:</p>
<p><a href="https://addons.mozilla.org/en-GB/firefox/addon/ai-overview-hider-for-google/" title="Firefox and Firefox for Android" rel="nofollow"><img <li>
  <strong>2026-02-20</strong> – <a href="https://github.com/insin/control-panel-for-twitter">control-panel-for-twitter</a> <a href="https://github.com/insin/control-panel-for-twitter/releases/tag/v4.22.2">v4.22.2</a>
  <div><em>Browser extension which gives you more control over your Twitter timeline and adds missing features and UI improvements - for desktop and mobile</em></div>
  <details><summary>v4.22.2 release notes</summary><p>Visit the <a href="https://soitis.dev/control-panel-for-twitter" rel="nofollow">Control Panel for Twitter website</a> for installation links, more information about the extension, and FAQs (mostly about why Safari is so weird about extensions).</p>
<p>Follow <a href="https://twitter.com/ControlPanelFT" rel="nofollow">@ControlPanelFT</a> on Twitter or <a href="https://bsky.app/profile/soitis.dev" rel="nofollow">@soitis.dev</a> on Bluesky for updates.</p>
<h2>Changes</h2>
<ul>
<li>Added an option to hide suggested content (People, News, Communities etc.) in Search, enabled by default</li>
<li>Fixed Notifications being switched to the Priority tab on repeat visits when you have "Use the Following timeline by default" enabled on mobile</li>
<li>Fixed Dim theme Progressive Web App (PWA) theme</li>
<li>Fixed Dim theme hovers in the Chat info dialog</li>
<li>Fixed Dim theme scrollbars</li>
</ul>
<h2>Availability (5/5)</h2>

<p>This version is available for the following browsers:</p>
<p><a href="https://apps.apple.com/app/id1668516167?platform=iphone" title="Safari on iOS" rel="nofollow"><img
